title: DART (NCI/SWOG S1609): comprehensive final results from dual checkpoint inhibition with CTLA-4 and PD-1 blockade in rare cancers.
abstract: We summarize final results of the NCI/SWOG S1609 trial, the objective of which was to evaluate efficacy signals across 53 refractory rare cancer cohorts treated with dual cytotoxic T-lymphocyte-associated antigen 4 and programmed cell death protein 1 inhibition.
